Engg-Projects

Engineering & Side Projects

Older engineering tools, applied-ML exercises, and creative-AI experiments outside the research line.

This page collects projects kept for completeness but outside my research portfolio. They include engineering tools, applied-ML exercises, creative-AI experiments, and earlier coursework. For research-aligned work, see Research Projects.

T20 Decision Intelligence Platform (IPL)

Applied MLSports AnalyticsOffline RL

Analyst-grade decision intelligence platform on IPL 2008–2025 ball-by-ball data with 12 custom metrics, calibrated ML models, and an offline RL strategy lab.

Status: Completed

Details Code Demo

SocialMedia AD Agency: AI Ad Creation SaaS

Multi-AgentSaaSEngineering

Production-grade SaaS for automated ad creation using CrewAI multi-agent orchestration with seven specialised agents.

Status: Completed

Details Code

YouTube Chat Giveaway Bot

ToolingEngineering

Desktop application for conducting giveaways from YouTube live chat with real-time monitoring and audit-friendly winner selection.

Status: Completed

Details Code

E-Commerce Data Analysis Pipeline

Data EngineeringCloud

Cloud-native big-data pipeline on AWS EMR/S3/Athena for e-commerce analytics.

Status: Completed

American Sign Language Detection System

Computer VisionEngineering

CNN-based real-time ASL gesture recognition system.

Status: Completed

Crude Oil Price Prediction

Time SeriesApplied ML

Time-series forecasting for crude oil prices using ARIMA and LSTM.

Status: Completed

CryptoApp: Mobile Encryption Tool

MobileEngineering

Status: Completed

Applied MLNLP
